response.description_long: Wellness studios — yoga, pilates, massage, and spa businesses — often juggle bookings across multiple staff and class slots without a dedicated system. Glowharbor provides scheduling software that lets clients book online, pay deposits, and receive automatic reminders. Studio owners manage staff calendars and class capacity from a single dashboard. The site does not elaborate on technical implementation, integrations, or market positioning, but it clearly targets a specific niche with a simple, location-based pricing model: $29 per month per location. There is no mention of notable customers, traction metrics, or competitive context. The profile is limited by the thin source material.
